user.title: Genergy Dashboard Setup
user.description: Set up your solar dashboard. Enable defaults for quick setup.

core.title: Core Power Sensors
core.description: Select the main power sensors for your inverter system.

energy.title: Daily Energy Sensors
energy.description: Select sensors for daily energy totals. Enable dual tariff if your smart meter reports separate high/low tariff readings — the integration will automatically create combined daily sensors.

data.feature_dual_tariff: Enable Dual Tariff (smart meter with high/low tariff counters)
data.grid_import_high_tariff: Grid Import — High Tariff (kWh, cumulative total from smart meter)
data.grid_import_low_tariff: Grid Import — Low Tariff (kWh, cumulative total from smart meter)
data.grid_export_high_tariff: Grid Export — High Tariff (kWh, cumulative total from smart meter)
data.grid_export_low_tariff: Grid Export — Low Tariff (kWh, cumulative total from smart meter)

extras.title: Additional Entities & Features
extras.description: Configure optional sensors, device details, and feature toggles. Enable EMHASS/Solcast to auto-populate their standard entity names.

data.ev_energy_today: EV Charging Energy Today (kWh, for Sankey graph)
data.ev_energy_daily_meter: EV Daily Utility Meter (auto-created for cumulative sensors)
data.heat_pump_energy_today: Heat Pump Energy Today (kWh, for Sankey graph)
data.hp_energy_daily_meter: HP Daily Utility Meter (auto-created for cumulative sensors)
data.ev_energy_is_cumulative: EV Energy sensor is cumulative (use daily meter)
data.hp_energy_is_cumulative: HP Energy sensor is cumulative (use daily meter)
data.show_ev_in_sankey: Show EV Consumption in Sankey Graph
data.show_hp_in_sankey: Show Heat Pump in Sankey Graph

missing_cards.title: Missing HACS Frontend Cards
missing_cards.description: The following HACS frontend plugins are required for the Genergy Dashboard but are not installed: {cards}. Install them via HACS (Frontend section), then restart Home Assistant.
